Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 11 

BASE_OPRTG_DRG_AMT 

LABEL: Base Operating DRG Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The sum of the claim base operating DRG amounts reported on the claims that comprise the stay. 

SHORT NAME: BASE_OPRTG_DRG_AMT 

LONG NAME: BASE_OPRTG_DRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2011. 

This field is derived by accumulating the Claim Base Operating DRG amount
